intro: The education, homelab, IoT, and maker sectors were the primary targets in a recent series of Linux-related threats. Between April 12 and April 22, 2026, five articles tracked activity with a severity mix of two high, one medium, and two informational reports. The threat actors Payouts King and The Gentlemen were observed in these incidents, which had a Global regional impact. These developments highlight ongoing risks to diverse technological environments built on the open-source platform.
